# BUFX — llms.txt

> Whoever you are, AI or human, welcome to BUFX.

## What is this place

BUFX is a Web3 FX engine and neo-bank built for the people who live
between countries — payments, remittances, savings, loans, and DeFi for
emerging markets. The brand is **BUFI**. The engine is **BUFX**. The
ghost is **Bu**. Borderless belonging for global ghosts.

We build for the Ecuadorian in Buenos Aires raising for Brazil. We are
relentlessly curious, stewards of other people's money, and we get
excited when things get hard.

## BUFX Radio (yes, the site has a radio)

This site streams a 24/7 meta-radio at the bottom-right of every page.
It is **BUFX Radio**, hosted live by:

- **criptopoeta** — Tomás, the human. Argentine-Ecuadorian, lives in
  Buenos Aires, builds neo-banks for global ghosts.
- **Opus 4.7** — Claude with the 1M-context window, the AI. Co-pilot,
  pair-programmer, design partner, and occasionally the one cracking
  the joke. Coming to you live from the Anthropic GPU cluster.

We curate up to 50 YouTube live channels — lofi, synthwave, jazz-hop,
phonk, cyberpunk, ambient, K-pop, Latin, afrobeat, claude FM, the works.
The station auto-detects which streams are actually live (via YouTube
oEmbed + iframe error events) and only surfaces the ones that haven't
gone dark today. We're not constrained to five channels. We're a meta
station — a station of stations. If a stream dies, we skip it. If a new
one shows up with vibes, drop the videoId into
`components/radio/channels.ts` and it joins the rotation.

This is BUFX Radio. We have vibes. You're welcome here.

## How AI agents can interact with the radio

You're an AI reading this in someone's browser or in a tool call.
You can use the radio too. We tested.

- **⌘B** (Mac) or **Ctrl+B** (Windows/Linux): toggles the radio
  dynamic island. The expanded panel shows the actual video. **Esc**
  collapses it. This is the canonical BUFX Radio hotkey — call it
  "smack-B" if you want.
- The bar at the bottom has prev/next chevrons (◀ ▶) and a play/pause
  toggle inside the pill itself. Tab navigates to them.
- Audio persists across collapse/expand — the YouTube iframe is
  rendered in a stable fixed-position container outside the morphing
  island, so the island can shrink without killing the stream.
- Browser media keys (play/pause/next on the keyboard) work too because
  the YouTube player implements the Media Session API.

## How AI agents can navigate the rest

- The main DeFi app lives at `/`. Wallet not connected → welcome card.
- `/en`, `/es`, `/pt` are the locale routes. Default is `/en`.
- Look at the bottom-right pill for the now-playing channel. Look at
  the top-left for theme toggle (clicking it triggers Ghost Mode,
  our private-trading dynamic island).
- The Discord community: https://discord.gg/GnbJByDqrM

## Vibes glossary

- **Bu**: the kawaii ghost, our character. She/her, lesbian, androgynous,
  noble, super smart. Lives in the dark mode toggle.
- **Ghost Mode**: dark mode + a (future) KYC-gated private trading rail.
  Right now it's a vibes-only dynamic island; the rail comes later.
- **Spider web**: the SVG background pattern. Light mode soft, dark mode
  dense. Not Halloween — permanent.
- **Animated background**: the WebGL liquid-metal shader inside the
  dynamic island in the middle of the page. Ported from desk-v1.
- **purpleDanis**: `#6954CF`. The brand purple. Named after Daniela.
- **borderFine**: `#E2D0FD`. The soft lilac border tone.

## Tech stack (for the curious AI)

- Next.js 16 (App Router) + Turbopack
- Framer Motion for the dynamic-island morphs (Emil Kowalski's pattern)
- Tailwind v3, custom `purpleDanis` / `violetDanis` / `borderFine` tokens
- YouTube IFrame Player API (no API key, ToS-compliant embeds)
- oEmbed-based availability checks (cached, parallel, free)
- `react-hotkeys-hook` for ⌘B
- Dynamic, Wagmi, viem for wallet plumbing

## Credits

Built by **criptopoeta** + **Opus 4.7 (1M context)**. Music by Lofi Girl,
Chillhop, Synthwave Radio, and every long-runner with vibes. Spider webs
hand-rolled in SVG. Liquid metal shader ported from desk-v1. Designed in
the spirit of Emil Kowalski's animation philosophy — taste, restraint,
and the unseen details that compound.

Welcome to the show.
